risk_title: Right-of-Way (ROW) Issues Delaying Critical Infrastructure Works
risk_summary: Pending resolution of right-of-way issues is blocking completion of river training works at Guddu Barrage, which is necessary to achieve the design flood passage capacity target. This suggests potential land acquisition disputes or community resistance affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Pending replacement of main Barrage gates and full completion of river training works (which needs resolution of pending ROW issues).

risk_summary: The macroeconomic risk rating has escalated from Moderate at approval to High at the last approved rating (March 2024), indicating worsening economic conditions in Pakistan that could impact project implementation capacity and sustainability of irrigation infrastructure operations.
evidence_quote: Macroeconomic: Moderate [at Approval] → High [Last Approved Rating AF Seq. 01 Approval - 22 Mar 2024]
